film.title: Dangal
film.overview: Dangal is an extraordinary true story based on the life of Mahavir Singh and his two daughters, Geeta and Babita Phogat. The film traces the inspirational journey of a father who trains his daughters to become world class wrestlers.

dialogues.dialogue: Mahavir Singh has gone mad. Not mad, he's become shameless. He's getting the girls to Wear shorts and fight boys. Since you all started Wrestling, your Walk has become very manly.
dialogues.cause_raw: making girls wear shorts and wrestle

dialogues.dialogue: but to the entire district of Bhivvani. And we are sure that, she will make our tovvn proud in the National Sub-Juniors, too. Leave? For two months? ls your daughter getting married?
She's playing well. If you support her today, then one day, she will make the nation proud. Look, Mahavir Singh-ji, vve get this much funding for sports.
dialogues.cause_raw: future potential of making the nation proud through sports

dialogues.dialogue: In order to prepare them, he made them wrestle boys. Took the taunts and abuses of the entire village, just so that one day they would make the country proud. Look, sir. Look.
A grand opening ceremony to the 2010 Commonwealth Games! Host nation, India, displaying her ancient culture. A proud moment indeed! And here comes the Indian contingent! A huge welcome for them.
India's Geeta Kurnari Phogat, has proven her critics wrong. A proud moment for Geeta's father, Mahavir Singh Phogat! So far India has vvon, five gold, 13 silver and seven bronze medals.
Let's find out Whether Geeta's finals is against the Australian, or the Scottish Wrestler. I'm very proud of Geeta. She followed my strategy to the T. The result is in front of you.
Hello, Mr. Shamim. Congratulations, Mahavir-ji! Geeta fought very well. All of Balali is proud. And these girls insisted, on watching Geetafs match in the stadium, or they Won't eat.

Who would have thought that a girl from a small village in India, is capable of leaving her mark on the who/e world! Well done, Geeta! A proud moment for India indeed! Champion! Where's papa? I don't know.
And finally uncle uttered those golden words, that we had been pining to hear for the past 10 years. I'm proud of you!
